ValidationRule.description: VPR Approval and EVP Approval cannot be set in the past
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(EVP_Approval__c), ISCHANGED(VPR_Approval__c) ), OR( EVP_Approval__c < TODAY(), VPR_Approval__c < TODAY() ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: VPR Approval OR EVP Approval cannot be set in the past.
